name: PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk
summary: PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops housing projects in Indonesia. It sells residential buildings and land plots. The company develops housing projects under the name of Bintang Metropol in Bekasi, Mahkota Simprug in Tangerang, and Saung Riung in Karawang. PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
